trivia_bullets.text: Battle for Zendikar (October 2015) depicts the Eldrazi titan Ulamog's devastation of Zendikar. Affa, named in the flavor text as Jalun's base, is a large settlement at the base of the Teeth of Akoum mountain range on the continent of Akoum; during the Eldrazi invasion it survived by retreating into underground caverns. [Scryfall: set_name Battle for Zendikar, released_at 2015-10-02; MTG Salvation: World of Zendikar Part V, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: MTG Salvation: World of Zendikar Part V, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Whiptails can sense a traveler's footsteps from a great distance. Measuring that distance has been . . . difficult." — Jalun, Affa sentry. [Scryfall]

Belligerent Whiptail's official creature type is Wurm — not Lizard or Reptile despite its visual resemblance to a serpentine lizard in the art. Landfall — gaining first strike whenever a land enters — fits the Zendikar block's signature mechanic introduced in the original Zendikar (2009) and reprised in Battle for Zendikar. The card is a sole printing; EDHREC rank 26,207 places it in the unplayed-commons tier. [Scryfall: type_line: Creature — Wurm, keywords: Landfall, edhrec_rank: 26207, reprint: false]

Art by Jakub Kasper — a Polish illustrator whose MTG work concentrates in the Battle for Zendikar block and later sets. The Belligerent Whiptail commission is one of his earlier Wizards credits. [Scryfall: artist field]

related_cards.name: Plated Geopede
related_cards.note: Red Wurm/Lizard creature with Landfall in original Zendikar; same mechanic, similar red-aggressive role

related_cards.name: Oran-Rief Hydra
related_cards.note: Another BFZ Landfall payoff creature; contrasts the Whiptail's cheap-aggro vs. hydra's late-game scaling

related_cards.name: Territorial Baloth
related_cards.note: Green BFZ Landfall beast; same block, same mechanic, different color axis

related_cards.name: Fierce Empath
related_cards.note: Can tutor Wurm-type creatures; taxonomic connection via creature type for any Wurm-tribal build
